Title: Verify Library Books page loads with all expected elements
Preconditions: Browser is open, App is running at localhost:3001
Steps:
Given I navigate to the Library Books page
Then I should see the header with 'Library Management' link
And I should see the 'Library Books' page title
And I should see a search input and Search Books button
And I should see a table with columns Book ID, Title, Available Stock, Actions
And I should see the footer text
Expected Results: All page elements are visible: navigation, title, search bar, book table with correct headers, and footer

Title: Verify books table displays all books with correct data
Preconditions: Browser is open, App has been reset via exam fixtures
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I inspect the book table
Then each row should display Book ID, Title, Available Stock in 'X of Y' format
And each row should have Show Log, Return, and Checkout action links
Expected Results: All books are displayed with correct data format; action links are present for each book

Title: Verify search books by exact title
Preconditions: Browser is open, Books exist in the system
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type 'Clean Code for Libraries' in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then I should see exactly 1 result matching that title
Expected Results: One row is displayed matching the exact title 'Clean Code for Libraries'

Title: Verify search books by book ID
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book with ID 9001 exists
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type '9001' in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then I should see exactly 1 result with Book ID 9001
Expected Results: One row is displayed with Book ID 9001

Title: Verify search books by partial title
Preconditions: Browser is open, Books exist in the system
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type 'JavaScript' in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then I should see results containing 'JavaScript' in the title
Expected Results: At least one row is displayed with a title containing 'JavaScript'

Title: Verify search with no matching results
Preconditions: Browser is open, Books exist in the system
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type 'NonExistentBookXYZ' in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then I should see no results or an empty state message
Expected Results: No book rows are displayed or an appropriate 'no results' message is shown

Title: Verify search field clears and shows all books
Preconditions: Browser is open, Books exist in the system
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I search for '9001' and see 1 result
And I clear the search input
And I click Search Books
Then all books should be shown again
Expected Results: The full book list is restored after clearing the search input

Title: Verify checkout page loads with correct book info
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9005 (Checkout Ready) has 1 of 1 stock
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I click the Checkout link for book 9005
Then I should see the Checkout Book page with the book's ID, title, and available stock
And the Submit Checkout button should be disabled
Expected Results: Checkout page displays correct book info; submit button is disabled until member is looked up

Title: Verify checkout a book with valid member and available stock
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9005 has 1 of 1 stock, Member exam.checkout-ready@example.com exists
Steps:
Given I am on the Checkout page for book 9005
When I enter 'exam.checkout-ready@example.com' in the Library Member ID field
And the borrower name and phone are loaded
And I click Submit Checkout
Then the checkout should succeed and stock should decrease to '0 of 1'
Expected Results: Checkout completes successfully; Available Stock for book 9005 changes from '1 of 1' to '0 of 1'

Title: Verify checkout a book that is out of stock
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9003 (Out Of Stock) has 0 of 0 stock
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I click the Checkout link for book 9003
Then the system should prevent the checkout or show an error/disabled state
Expected Results: Submit button remains disabled or an error message indicates the book is out of stock

Title: Verify Submit Checkout is disabled without member lookup
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9005 has available stock
Steps:
Given I am on the Checkout page for book 9005
When I have not entered a Library Member ID
Then the Submit Checkout button should be disabled
Expected Results: Submit Checkout button is disabled; user cannot submit without looking up a borrower

Title: Verify return page loads with correct book info
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9001 (Return On Time) exists
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I click the Return link for book 9001
Then I should see the Return Book page with book ID, title, and member ID input
And the Submit Return button should be disabled
Expected Results: Return page displays correct book info; submit button is disabled until member is looked up

Title: Verify return a book on time shows no overdue fine
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9001 has an active on-time checkout by exam.return-on-time@example.com
Steps:
Given I am on the Return page for book 9001
When I enter 'exam.return-on-time@example.com' in the Library Member ID field
And the borrower is loaded
Then the Overdue fine should show 'Rp0'
And I click Submit Return
Then the return should succeed and stock should increase
Expected Results: Return completes successfully; Overdue fine is Rp0; stock for book 9001 increases to '1 of 1'

Title: Verify return a late book shows overdue fine
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9002 has an active late checkout by exam.return-late@example.com
Steps:
Given I am on the Return page for book 9002
When I enter 'exam.return-late@example.com' in the Library Member ID field
And the borrower is loaded
Then the Overdue fine should show an amount greater than Rp0
Expected Results: Overdue fine is displayed with an amount greater than Rp0 indicating a late return penalty

Title: Verify Submit Return is disabled without member lookup
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9001 exists
Steps:
Given I am on the Return page for book 9001
When I have not entered a Library Member ID
Then the Submit Return button should be disabled
Expected Results: Submit Return button is disabled; user cannot submit without looking up a borrower

Title: Verify Show Log for a book with empty history
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9004 (Empty History) has no checkout/return events
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I click the Show Log link for book 9004
Then I should see the Book Log page with an empty state message
Expected Results: Book Log page displays message: 'No circulation events have been recorded for this book yet.'

Title: Verify Show Log for a book after checkout shows log entry
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 9005 has been checked out
Steps:
Given I have completed a checkout for book 9005
When I click the Show Log link for book 9005
Then I should see at least one log entry for the checkout event
Expected Results: Book Log page displays at least one circulation event row for the checkout

Title: Verify available stock displays correct X of Y format
Preconditions: Browser is open, Books exist in the system
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I inspect the Available Stock column for each book
Then each cell should display stock in 'X of Y' format where X is less than or equal to Y
Expected Results: All stock cells match the pattern 'X of Y' with X <= Y

Title: Verify large stock numbers display correctly
Preconditions: Browser is open, Book 'PostgreSQL for Archivists' has stock 99999 of 99999
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I find the row for 'PostgreSQL for Archivists'
Then the stock should display '99999 of 99999' without layout overflow
Expected Results: Stock cell displays '99999 of 99999' correctly without UI overflow

Title: Verify Back to Book List navigation from all sub-pages
Preconditions: Browser is open, Books exist in the system
Steps:
Given I navigate to the Checkout, Return, or Book Log page
When I click 'Back to Book List'
Then I should be redirected back to the Library Books page
Expected Results: User is navigated back to the Book List page from each sub-page

Title: Verify XSS injection in search input is sanitized
Preconditions: Browser is open, App is running
Steps: Given I am on the Library Books page When I type '' or '' in the search input And I click Search Books Then no script should execute and no injected HTML should render
Expected Results: No alert is triggered; no injected elements appear in the DOM; application remains functional

Title: Verify SQL injection in search input is handled safely
Preconditions: Browser is open, App is running
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type "' OR '1'='1' --" in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then the application should not expose database errors or return all records
Expected Results: No SQL error is displayed; search returns no results or an empty state; no data leakage occurs

Title: Verify special characters in search do not crash application
Preconditions: Browser is open, App is running
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type special characters (%00, ${7*7}, {{7*7}}, emoji) in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then the application should handle the input gracefully
Expected Results: Application does not crash; page remains functional with search button and table visible

Title: Verify excessively long search input is handled safely
Preconditions: Browser is open, App is running
Steps:
Given I am on the Library Books page
When I type a very long string (10000 characters) in the search input
And I click Search Books
Then the application should handle the input without crashing
Expected Results: Application does not crash; page remains functional with search button and table visible
